extract: Poipole (Japanese: ベベノム Bevenom) is a Poison-type Pokémon introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. It evolves into Naganadel when leveled up while knowing Dragon Pulse. It is one of the Ultra Beasts and is codenamed UB Adhesive (Japanese: ＵＢ：ＳＴＩＣＫＹ UB: Sticky) by the International Police.
